catalog_row.ModelType: Medium-sized New Keynesian DSGE with endogenous labor force participation; nonlinear paper model; log-variable first-order MMB implementation
catalog_row.KeyFeatures: Endogenous labor force participation; search and matching; alternating-offer wage bargaining; Calvo prices; risky working capital; ZLB and forward guidance; financial, consumption, neutral technology, investment technology, and government shocks

status_row.formula_quality: first-pass source-backed equation map; several equations require technical-appendix review
status_row.notes: Shared catalog/status not edited per user instruction. No Dynare run performed.

validation.details: English and Chinese each contain 112 F-number references and 49 unique F-numbers.

unresolved_issues: Technical appendix was not available as a normalized appendix file.
Calvo pricing recursions, investment FOC, utilization FOC, and labor-force FOC need source-level confirmation.
Steady-state derivation is a calibrated target map, not a full symbolic proof.
No Dynare runtime validation was performed.
